purpose: Map Document IR blocks into GroundTruthDraft fields
input_contract: Document IR JSON + optional domain profile id
notes: Runtime copy: packages/agent-core/src/structuring-prompt.ts (blocks include media_uri for page_screenshots). Enable LLM path with EBS_LLM_STRUCTURING=1 and EBS_LLM_API_BASE / EBS_LLM_API_KEY (LiteLLM proxy uses OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions). Validation: GroundTruthDraftSchema before persistence; fallback to rules on failure.
